error.forbiddenDetail: You don't have permission to view the dashboard.
error.loadFailed: Failed to load the dashboard. Please refresh the page.

banner.noActivity: Your AI assistant has not been used yet {{period}}. Once you connect an AI client to a server, its activity will appear here.
banner.allGood_one: Everything is running smoothly. Your AI completed all {{total}} task successfully {{period}}.
banner.allGood_other: Everything is running smoothly. Your AI completed all {{total}} tasks successfully {{period}}.
banner.someErrors_one: Your AI ran {{total}} task {{period}}. {{successes}} went well — {{errors}} had issues. Check the projects below for details.
banner.someErrors_other: Your AI ran {{total}} tasks {{period}}. {{successes}} went well — {{errors}} had issues. Check the projects below for details.
banner.manyErrors_one: Attention needed. {{errors}} out of {{total}} task had problems {{period}}. Please review your server settings.
banner.manyErrors_other: Attention needed. {{errors}} out of {{total}} tasks had problems {{period}}. Please review your server settings.
banner.noServers: You have no servers yet. Create your first server to start connecting your AI assistant to an API.

help.tasksTitle: How many tasks your AI ran
help.tasksContent: Each time your AI assistant calls one of your integrations — for example "look up this customer" or "create a new ticket" — that counts as one task. The number here shows the total for the selected period.
help.integrationsContent: Each integration connects one of your APIs (CRM, ticketing system, database, etc.) to your AI assistant. Once connected, the AI can query and update that system in any conversation.
help.actionsContent: Each "action" is something specific your AI can do — like "search for a contact", "create an order", or "check server status". More actions means your AI can help with more tasks.
help.securityContent: Secured integrations require a secret key before an AI client can connect. This prevents unauthorised access. It is recommended to protect all integrations that connect to real production data.
help.chartHint: Each bar represents one time slot. Hover over a bar for exact numbers.
help.chartRed: All requests in that slot failed.
help.topActionsContent: The actions your AI assistant called most often in the selected period. High-use actions are the most important for your team — make sure they are configured correctly and their descriptions are clear.
help.statusHint: Shows the current health of each integration based on the last hour of activity.
help.statusGreen: All requests succeeded in the last hour.
help.statusYellow: Some requests had issues (1–19% failure rate).
help.statusRed: Many requests are failing (20%+ failure rate). Needs attention.
help.statusGrey: No activity in the last hour, or the integration is paused.

tasks.title: How did tasks go?
tasks.noActivity: No activity yet in this period.
tasks.issueHint_one: 1 task had an issue. Open the relevant server and check its logs to see what went wrong.
tasks.issueHint_other: {{count}} tasks had issues. Open the affected servers and check their logs to find out what went wrong.

topTools.title: What your AI used most
topTools.noActivity: No activity yet — your AI hasn't run any tasks in this period.

healthStatus.title: Status right now
healthStatus.noActivity: No activity in the last hour
